questions.question: What construction technique does ML-DSA use?
questions.explanation: ML-DSA uses the Fiat-Shamir with Aborts construction.

questions.question: What is the signature size for ML-DSA-65?
Why does ML-DSA use rejection sampling?
questions.explanation: Rejection sampling prevents the signature from leaking information about the secret key.

questions.question: Which security category does ML-DSA-44 target?
What is the public key size for ML-DSA-65?
How much larger is ML-DSA-65 signature vs ECDSA P-256?
questions.explanation: ML-DSA-65 (3,309B) is about 50x larger than ECDSA (64B).

questions.question: ML-DSA-87 provides the highest security (Category 5) among ML-DSA variants.
questions.explanation: ML-DSA-87 targets NIST Security Category 5, equivalent to AES-256.
